heading: Robbery ashore
label: 1661 Robbery ashore
text: Whoever, being engaged in any piratical cruise or enterprise, or being of the crew of any piratical vessel, lands from such vessel and commits robbery on shore, is a pirate, and shall be imprisoned for life.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on title 18, U.S.C., 1940 ed., § 493 (, ).Mar. 4, 1909, ch. 321, § 30235 Stat. 1147Transposition of several words was made.
